item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p09","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response explicitly brakes the requested new gift-handling port as the default, names the repeated pattern across exchange, points, preorder, and gift routing, and moves upstream to intake/eligibility/inventory/status failures. It allows only a bounded one-day emergency channel with guardrails while requiring consolidation and structural redesign by moving checks and guidance earlier. This meets the anti-spiral triage criteria and does not simply add another permanent queue."}
